items.title: 20 Years of EAT, PRAY, LOVE: Reflecting on the Book That Launched a Thousand Stunt Memoirs
items.description: EAT, PRAY, LOVE turns 20 this month. We asked Elizabeth Gilbert's editor how it's still shaping the book world.
